name: 12q24_SLC6A6_SD
description: 12q24.31 segmental duplication interval flanking SLC6A6 (taurine transporter) and the 12q24 / KCNJ8 region. Intra- and interchromosomal SDs link this locus to other SLC6-family paralogs across the genome.

architecture.internal_structure: Family-internal SDs of 5-15 kb to SLC6A1/2/3/4/11/12/13 paralogs on chr3, chr5, chr16; short subtelomeric SDs.
